zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Lancaster於大約1420年出生在英國藍卡爾萊爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Lancaster21歲，母親Lady Margaret Bradshawe31歲。他於1450年與Blanch Leigh在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Lancaster于大约1420年出生在英国藍卡爾萊爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Lancaster21岁，母亲Lady Margaret Bradshawe31岁。他于1450年与Blanch Leigh在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Lancaster was born about 1420, in Rainhill, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Richard Lancaster, was 21 and his mother, Lady Margaret Bradshawe, was 31. He married Blanch Leigh in 1450, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1484, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Lancaster est né environ 1420, à Rainhill, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Lancaster, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Bradshawe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Blanch Leigh en 1450, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1484, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Lancaster um 1420 in Rainhill, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Lancaster 21 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Bradshawe 31. Er hat 1450 in England, United Kingdom Blanch Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1484 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lancaster è nato il circa 1420 nel Rainhill, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Lancaster, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Bradshawe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Blanch Leigh nel 1450, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1484, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Lancasterが約1420年にイギリスランカシュアイアレインヒルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Lancasterは21歳，母Lady Margaret Bradshaweは31歳であった。1450年にイギリスイギリスでBlanch Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Lancaster(이)가 대략 1420년 영국 랭카실르 레이힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Lancaster(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Bradshawe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Blanch Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1420, em Rainhill, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Lancaster, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Bradshawe, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanch Leigh em 1450, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1484, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Lancaster родился около 1420 г. в местности реинилл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Lancaster было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Bradshawe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanch Leigh в 1450 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1484 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Lancaster nació aproximadamente 1420, en Rainhill, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Lancaster, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Bradshawe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Blanch Leigh en 1450, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1484, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
